title: Add make seed target to Makefile
description:
## Objective
Wire up the make target. make seed should chain supabase-reset-database then run the seeder.

## Spec Reference
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold-spec.md — Section: Step 4

## Scope
**Files:** Makefile — add new seed target near supabase-reset-database (around line 28)

## Implementation
1. Add this near the existing supabase-reset-database target:
     seed: supabase-reset-database ## reset DB and load demo seed data
     	npx tsx scripts/seed-supabase.ts
2. Make sure indentation uses a TAB, not spaces (Makefile requirement)
3. Keep supabase-reset-database untouched — both targets must work independently

## Tests
Run: make help (should now list seed in the help output)
Run: make supabase-reset-database (should still work — schema-only reset)
Do NOT close until both pass.
acceptance_criteria: make help lists seed; make supabase-reset-database still works
